D5 Design L5 Evaluate Reference

APCA Font Matrix

Lc alone is not pass or fail — it sets a minimum font size and weight; find your pair on the Bronze lookup table

APCA has no single threshold. Instead a contrast level Lc maps to a minimum font size for each weight: more contrast lets text be smaller and thinner. The Bronze conformance table is a lookup, not a formula — read it like a chart.

Set the text and background lightness and the weight. The computed Lc lands in a column; the highlighted cell is the smallest size that pair may safely use. Empty cells fall below Bronze — that pairing should not carry body text.
